# comfyui_kling_omni_pro_video_to_video_node (Resource)

Use a video and up to 4 reference images to generate a video with the latest Kling model. [api node/video/Kling]



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `aspect_ratio` (String) Input: COMBO
- `duration` (Number) Input: INT default: 3
- `keep_original_sound` (Boolean) Input: BOOLEAN default: true
- `model_name` (String) Input: COMBO
- `prompt` (String) Input: STRING
- `reference_video` (String) Input: VIDEO (link)

### Optional

- `reference_images` (String) Input: IMAGE (link)
- `resolution` (String) Input: COMBO
- `seed` (Number) Input: INT default: 0

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this node instance
- `node_id` (String) ComfyUI node class type
- `video_output` (String) Output: VIDEO (slot 0)
